# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The name of the SQL server.
  databaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The name of the SQL database.
  adminLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Administrator username for the SQL server.
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Password for the administrator login.
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: [resourceGroup().location]
    metadata:
      description: Location of all resources.

resources:
- name: '[parameters("sqlServerName")]'
  type: 'Microsoft.Sql/servers'
  apiVersion: '2017-10-01-preview'
  location: '[parameters("location")]'
  properties:
    administratorLogin: '[parameters("adminLogin")]'
    administratorLoginPassword: '[parameters("adminPassword")]'
    version: '12.0'

- name: '[concat(parameters("sqlServerName"), "/", parameters("databaseName"))]'
  type: 'Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases'
  apiVersion: '2017-10-01-preview'
  location: '[parameters("location")]'
  dependsOn:
    - '[resourceId("Microsoft.Sql/servers", parameters("sqlServerName"))]'
  properties:
    createMode: 'Default'
    requestedServiceObjectiveName: 'S0'

outputs:
  sqlDatabaseConnectionString:
    type: string
    value: '[concat("Server=tcp:", reference(concat(parameters("sqlServerName"), "/servers"), "2017-10-01-preview").fullyQualifiedDomainName, ",1433;Initial Catalog=", parameters("databaseName"), ";Persist Security Info=False;User ID=", parameters("adminLogin"), "@", parameters("sqlServerName"), ";Password=", parameters("adminPassword"), ";MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;")]'
